title: kingiodendron alternifolium
intro: Kingiodendron alternifolium, a plant native to the tropical forests of New Guinea and nearby islands, is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's leaves and bark have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and are also believed to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. The herbal preparations of Kingiodendron alternifolium include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health benefits.
